metadata.description: Relative standard deviations (RSD) for emission factor uncertainty propagation
sources: IPCC AR6 WG1 Chapter 7 (GWP uncertainty ranges)
Huijbregts et al. 2003 — Evaluating uncertainty in environmental life-cycle assessment
EU PEF 2021/2279 — Product Environmental Footprint method

materials._note: RSD (0-1) for material emission factors (kgCO2e/kg and multi-substance profiles)

measured._description: Materials with direct DEFRA or literature emission factor data

generic_by_category._description: RSD for unknown materials falling back to category-aware generic factors

energy._note: RSD for grid electricity and manufacturing energy estimates
energy._explanation: Grid emission factors are well-documented (±8%, IEA/EEA). Manufacturing energy from benchmark medians is a rough heuristic (±55%) since actual factory energy varies widely by technology, scale, and location.

transport._note: RSD for transport emission factors and distance estimates
transport._explanation: Transport emission factors from DEFRA/IMO are moderate uncertainty (±12-15%). Shipping distances are estimates based on major port-to-port routes (±20%). Domestic last-mile distances are highly variable (±25%).

characterization_factors._note: RSD for EF 3.1 characterization factors by impact category. Climate change (GWP100) is very well established; toxicity categories have high uncertainty.

lifecycle_templates._note: RSD for use-phase and end-of-life template values (from lifecycle-templates.json)
lifecycle_templates._explanation: Use-phase energy varies by usage patterns (±30%). EOL treatment rates are regional averages with high variability (±25-45%). Recycling credits depend on secondary market quality.

classification._note: RSD for product classification inputs (price, weight, materials)
classification._explanation: Extracted or estimated product attributes. Weight from regression model is more precise (±15%) than midpoint estimate (±20%). Material composition from templates (±30%) vs detected from description (±20%).

supply_chain_eeio._note: RSD for EPA Supply Chain EEIO spend-based factors (kgCO2e/USD)
supply_chain_eeio._explanation: EEIO factors are sector averages with wide product variation. Exact NAICS match (±35%) is better than fallback NAICS (±45%). Generic manufacturing factor (339900) is highly uncertain (±55%).
